2605.21470.title: Agent JIT Compilation for Latency-Optimizing Web Agent Planning and Scheduling
2605.21470.paper_summary: Computer-use agents (CUA) automate tasks specified with natural language such as "order the cheapest item from Taco Bell" by generating sequences of calls to tools such as click, type, and scroll on a browser. Current implementations follow a sequential fetch-screenshot-execute loop where each iteration requires an LLM call, resulting in high latency and frequent errors from incorrect tool use. We present agent just-in-time (JIT) compilation, an alternative that compiles task descriptions directly into executable code that is free to include LLM calls, tool calls, and parallelization. Our approach comprises three components: (1) JIT-Planner, which generates multiple code plans, validates each against tool specifications, and selects the minimum-cost candidate; (2) JIT-Scheduler, which explores parallelization strategies via Monte Carlo cost estimation from learned latency distributions; and (3) an invariant-enforcing tool protocol specifying precondition and postcondition state requirements that reduce the rate of generating plans with incorrect tool use. Across 5 web applications, JIT-Planner achieves $10.4\times$ speedup and $+28\%$ accuracy over Browser-Use, while JIT-Scheduler achieves $2.4\times$ speedup and $+9\%$ accuracy over OpenAI CUA.
2605.21470.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理（CUA）通過生成對工具的調用序列（例如在瀏覽器上點擊、輸入和滾動）來自動執行用自然語言指定的任務，例如「從 Taco Bell 訂購最便宜的商品」。當前的實現遵循一個順序的獲取-截圖-執行循環，其中每次迭代都需要一次 LLM 調用，導致高延遲和因工具使用不當而產生的頻繁錯誤。我們提出了代理即時編譯（JIT），這是一種將任務描述直接編譯成可執行代碼的替代方案，該代碼可以自由地包含 LLM 調用、工具調用和並行化。我們的方法包括三個組件：（1）JIT-規劃器，它生成多個代碼計劃，並根據工具規範驗證每個計劃，選擇最低成本的候選方案；（2）JIT-調度器，它通過從學習到的延遲分佈中進行蒙特卡洛成本估算來探索並行化策略；（3）一個不變性強制工具協議，指定前置條件和後置條件狀態要求，以減少生成不正確工具使用計劃的比率。在 5 個網絡應用程序中，JIT-規劃器實現了 $10.4\times$ 的加速和 $+28\%$ 的準確度，相比之下，JIT-調度器實現了 $2.4\times$ 的加速和 $+9\%$ 的準確度，相比 OpenAI CUA。
2605.21470.author: Caleb Winston et.al.
2605.21470.authors: Caleb Winston, Ron Yifeng Wang, Azalia Mirhoseini, Christos Kozyrakis
